title: sympagis brunoniana
intro: Sympagis brunoniana, also known as Brunonia or Brown Betty, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Sympagis brunoniana include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
